sections.heading: Secondary Operations Capabilities
sections.text: Secondary Operations Capabilities Turnaround time for each process varies and is dependent on factors like part complexity and quantity.

sections.heading: Requirements and Lead Times for Secondary Operations
sections.text: Requirements and Lead Times for Secondary Operations Operation Required Inputs Lead Time Mold Texturing/Engraving Texturing 2D drawing/image with faces to be textured Desired texture (e.g., MT 11010) Engraving CAD with the text or graphics to be engraved modeled into the part on location and at desired depth +9 days for molds Pad Printing 2D drawing noting location of graphics Adobe Illustrator file of the text/graphics to be printed Material: Only ABS, PC, ABS/PC are available +5 days (repeat order) +10 days (first order) UV Printing 2D drawing noting location of graphics Adobe Illustrator file of the text/graphics to be printed Material: Only ABS, PC, ABS/PC, PMMA, PA +5 days (repeat orde...

sections.heading: Additional Resources
sections.text: Additional Resources Threaded Inserts with Heat Staking and Ultrasonic Welding Get threaded inserts on injection-molded parts for added durability and to connect multiple components together. Read Blog arrow_right_alt Plastic Part Marking using Pad Printing and Laser Engraving A common finishing option for companies is to mark parts using pad printing or laser engraving. Read Blog arrow_right_alt Digital Manufacturing Helps Medtech Firm's Goal to Improve Patient Outcomes Digital manufacturing helped HemoSonics’ aim to improve patient outcomes with its blood analysis machine, which is designed for use in critical care settings such as operating rooms.
